# Analysis Results Directory

This folder structures the functional and taxonomic profiles generated by the HUMAnN 3 pipeline.

## Git-Ignored Notice
All .tsv output tables and temporary run folders (*_temp/) are git-ignored to avoid tracking heavy, auto-generated data matrices in git.

## Directory Structure
* `gene_families/`: RelAb, CPM, and raw RPK gene abundance tables (UniRef90)
* `pathways/`: Pathway abundance (raw and CPM), pathway coverage, and unified cohort matrices (MetaCyc)
* `taxonomy/`: Taxonomic profiles (generated by MetaPhlAn)
